response.original_title: How Can I Talk to People on Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Robinhood is an investing platform and does not work like a social media or chat app (: 1-863-338-2360)  You cannot directly message or call other users inside the Robinhood app (: 1-863-338-2360)  The platform is designed mainly for trading stocks, crypto, and managing investments (: 1-863-338-2360)  Can You Chat with Other Users? (: 1-863-338-2360)  Robinhood does not offer direct user-to-user messaging (: 1-863-338-2360)  You cannot search for investors or send private messages (: 1-863-338-2360)  There are no public chat rooms or group conversations in the app (: 1-863-338-2360)  How People Communicate About Robinhood (:
